Related Entities

  • hospital CENTRAL FLORIDA LAKE MONROE HOSPITAL 2-star overall rating
  • hospital OVIEDO MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • snf SOLARIS HEALTHCARE FOREST LAKE 4-star, 222 beds
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF ALTAMONTE SPRINGS 2-star, 228 beds
  • snf LONGWOOD HEALTH AND REHABILITATION CENTER 1-star, 120 beds
  • snf HEALTHCARE AND REHAB OF SANFORD 3-star, 114 beds
  • snf VILLAGE ON THE GREEN 5-star, 60 beds
  • snf ISLAND LAKE CENTER 3-star, 120 beds
  • snf HARBORVIEW HEALTH CENTER WEST ALTAMONTE 2-star, 116 beds
  • snf TUSKAWILLA NURSING AND REHAB CENTER 4-star, 98 beds
  • snf AVIATA AT LAKE MARY 3-star, 120 beds
  • snf LEGACY POINTE AT UCF 1-star, 48 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
